title: Digestive Disorders & Gut Health Local Agent Result

reportOverview.reportTitle: Digestive Disorders & Gut Health Local Agent Result
reportOverview.summary: This deterministic local-agent example gives conservative Digestive Disorders & Gut Health context. It uses one local MCM6/LCT lactose-related marker row and sibling SelfDecode Gut Health sample-report rows as output-structure examples only. It does not claim a direct Digestive Disorders & Gut Health sample report or make digestive diagnosis, microbiome, diet, supplement, lab, medication, or treatment conclusions.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The local fixture contains MCM6/LCT rs4988235 CT for educational lactase-persistence context. This is not a diagnosis of lactose intolerance and does not establish a digestive-disorder, celiac, IBS, IBD, microbiome, symptom, diet, supplement, lab, medication, or treatment conclusion.
resultRows.description: Use this only as local educational lactose-related marker context; calibrated digestive-disorders and gut-health models are unavailable.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Your local fixture has one lactose-related marker context row. It does not explain digestive symptoms or decide whether you have a digestive condition.

resultRows.item: Digestive disorders and gut health model unavailable
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The fixture does not include calibrated digestive-disorders, gut-health, celiac, IBS, IBD, microbiome, symptom, diet-history, elimination-diet, probiotic, supplement, lab, medication, treatment, or ancestry-applicability models. Those sections must be marked unavailable instead of inferred.
resultRows.description: Missing model and non-genetic context are explicit limitations, not negative findings.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The local run should say what it cannot know. It should not guess diagnoses, microbiome status, symptoms, diets, probiotics, supplements, labs, medications, or treatments from this fixture.

resultRows.item: Health report scoring and recommendation method
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Health report scoring and recommendation method: sample label Risk scores, percentile gauges, and impact/evidence recommendation scores. The sample explains that Health Reports use DNA analysis to display risk scores or gauges, compare the score to a sample population percentile, and rank recommendations by impact and evidence.
resultRows.description: The local SelfDecode Gut Health sample PDF page 4 presents this as an observed report-output row.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Health report scoring and recommendation method is included only to show the sibling Gut Health sample-report output structure for Digestive Disorders & Gut Health. It is not a direct Digestive Disorders & Gut Health sample row and is not a local digestive diagnosis, microbiome, symptom, diet, supplement, lab, medication, or treatment finding.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Gut Health genetic-result categories: sample label 16 Genetic Results. The sample overview says the Gut Health report contains 16 genetic results across digestive issues, infections and inflammation, food intolerance, and gut microbiome.
resultRows.description: The local SelfDecode Gut Health sample PDF page 8 presents this as an observed report-output row.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Gut Health genetic-result categories is included only to show the sibling Gut Health sample-report output structure for Digestive Disorders & Gut Health. It is not a direct Digestive Disorders & Gut Health sample row and is not a local digestive diagnosis, microbiome, symptom, diet, supplement, lab, medication, or treatment finding.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Irritable Bowel: sample label Typical likelihood of IBS. The sample detail page labels Irritable Bowel as typical likelihood based on 395,382 genetic variants and shows a sample percentile bounded between 29% and 71% of the population.
resultRows.description: The local SelfDecode Gut Health sample PDF page 12 presents this as an observed report-output row.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Irritable Bowel is included only to show the sibling Gut Health sample-report output structure for Digestive Disorders & Gut Health. It is not a direct Digestive Disorders & Gut Health sample row and is not a local digestive diagnosis, microbiome, symptom, diet, supplement, lab, medication, or treatment finding.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Peptic Ulcers: sample label Typical likelihood of peptic ulcers. The sample detail page labels Peptic Ulcers as typical likelihood based on 113,543 genetic variants and lists risk factors including H. pylori, NSAID use, stress, alcohol, smoking, and genetics.
resultRows.description: The local SelfDecode Gut Health sample PDF page 13 presents this as an observed report-output row.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Probiotics recommendation structure: sample label Helps with indigestion, gut inflammation, IBS, H. pylori, gastrointestinal infection, microbiome diversity, constipation, and C. difficile. digestiveDisordersGutHealthContext: Treat digestive symptoms, persistent gastrointestinal changes, medication questions, lab interpretation, and supplement decisions as clinician-context questions, not genotype-only outputs.
Use the sibling sample rows only to preserve expected report structure when a local agent renders the package.
Keep calibrated disease-risk, microbiome, diet, probiotic, curcumin, supplement, lab, medication, and treatment outputs unavailable unless a future validated model and direct evidence are supplied.

references.title: Nutritional Genomics and Direct-to-Consumer Genetic Testing

genotypeSummary.phenotype: Report as educational lactose-related marker context only; do not diagnose lactose intolerance, digestive disease, microbiome status, symptoms, diet needs, supplement needs, lab status, medication action, or treatment from genotype alone.

genotypeSummary.effect: The local fixture intentionally omits calibrated digestive-disorders and gut-health models and non-genetic context.

probabilities.label: Digestive-disorders or gut-health probability
probabilities.reason: No calibrated Digestive Disorders & Gut Health model, direct report sample, clinical history, symptom history, microbiome data, lab data, medication data, or ancestry-applicability metadata is supplied.

uncertainty: The SelfDecode Gut Health rows are sibling output-structure evidence, not a direct Digestive Disorders & Gut Health sample report.
Sample-person genotypes and labels are not local findings.
MCM6/LCT rs4988235 CT is educational lactose-related context only and does not diagnose lactose intolerance or digestive disease.
missingInputs: Direct Digestive Disorders & Gut Health sample-report body/detail extraction
Calibrated digestive-disorders, gut-health, celiac, IBS, IBD, microbiome, symptom, diet-history, elimination-diet, probiotic, supplement, lab, medication, treatment, and ancestry-applicability models
Clinical history, symptom history, microbiome data, diet history, supplement use, lab results, medications, and clinician interpretation
limitations: Educational report only; not diagnosis or treatment.

No IBS, IBD, celiac, ulcer, reflux, constipation, gallstone, pancreatitis, appendicitis, infection, gluten sensitivity, lactose-intolerance diagnosis, microbiome status, probiotic need, curcumin need, supplement dosing, lab status, medication action, diet, elimination-diet, or treatment claim should be inferred from sample-only rows.
No raw genome data is included in this fixture or result artifact.
